text:
BOTTOM LINE — Risk-off, tech sold off, energy resilient amid oil surge. OpenAI miss crushed semis like ARM -8%, SOX -3.6%; WTI $100 boosted XLE +1.66%. Fed hold at 3.5-3.75% neutralized macro noise, DIA flat buffered large cap downside.

INDICES — VIX 17.8 down vs ma20 20.3. DIA -0.08%, SPY -0.49%, IWM -1.17%, QQQ -1.01%. Large > small by 0.07pp. USO +3.62% most notable cross-asset.

VOLUME — Elevated: IJR 1.0x, XLRE 1.0x gaining attention. Declining: SPY 0.6x, QQQ implied low, DIA 0.6x ignored. Vol down + price down signals distribution in core indices.

SECTORS — XLE Energy +1.66%, XLRE Real Estate +0.97%, XLP Staples +0.90%, XLV Healthcare +0.26%, XLU Utilities +0.13%, XLF Financials +0.08%, XLC Comms -0.05%, XLY Discretionary -0.70%, XLB Materials -0.73%, XLI Industrials -0.89%, XLK Technology -1.69%. Top industries USO +3.62%, FCG +1.60%; bottom URA -4.36%, SILJ -4.70%.

THE 7s — Top5: Energy +1.84% (strongest XOM, weakest CVX), Old Staples +1.80% (strongest KO, weakest PG), Software +0.78% (strongest ADBE, weakest CRM), Health +0.74%, Insurance +0.65%. Bot5: New Metals -4.60% (weakest ALB, strongest FCX), Old Metals -4.24% (weakest NEM, strongest FCX), Fab -4.03% (weakest TER, strongest ASML), New Staples -2.13% (weakest SPOT, strongest NFLX), Semi -2.13%.

FED & LIQUIDITY — Next FOMC Jun 17, CME hold 100%. Stance: Hawk 6 (Cook,Hammack,Kashkari,Logan,Barkin,Goolsbee), Neutral 5 (Powell,Williams,Barr,Jefferson,Paulson), Dove 4 (Bowman,Miran,Waller,Daly). USD stress 49/100 Normal, top CP-Tbill 97th percentile.

POSITIONING — SPY PCR_vol 1.13 elevated protection, skew +5.5% put premium fear. QQQ PCR_vol 1.07, skew +6.7%. Spot below GEX flips (SPY 648, QQQ 605) — dealer hedging risks amplification.

CROSS-ASSET — WTI USO +3.62% lifted XLE +1.66% despite broad risk-off. Gold GLD -1.86% diverged from oil strength, unusual no safe-haven bid.

SIGNALS — Fear & Greed 56.4 Neutral. Top movers TER -19.41% Fab7, SPOT -12.43% New Staples, ARM -8% semis. 20d mom: XLK +23.80% best sector, Semi +52.88% best basket; XLE -6.86% worst sector, Energy -4.74% 20d basket. Vol spikes TER 4.4x -19.41% distribution, SPOT 6.1x -12.43% distribution.

WATCH — TER -19.41%, vol 4.4x Fab7 distribution. SPOT -12.43%, vol 6.1x New Staples breakdown. IJT -0.78%, vol 2.8x small cap divergence.
